# Tailwind Growth

> A people-first, AI-native B2B growth partner for ambitious founders.

Tailwind Growth gives B2B services founders the AI-powered system and a seasoned growth leader to grow on their terms — handling the admin-heavy 70% of winning new work so founders can focus on high-value connection.

## Who we help

Founders and owners of B2B services businesses — lawyers, accountants, engineers, designers, HR/IR practitioners, consultants — who've grown through referrals but hit a ceiling.

## What we offer

- **The system**: A repeatable, AI-native growth system that automates the grind of winning new work.
- **The partner**: A seasoned growth leader (Baidy) embedded in your team for strategy, accountability, and senior support.
- **Daily guidance**: Know exactly what to work on each day to move every opportunity forward.

## About the founder

Baidy is a B2B revenue expert with 15+ years' experience as a Commercialisation Director, Investor, Chief Revenue Officer of a B2B software company, and Partner at a global professional services firm.

## Contact

- Website: https://tailwindgrowth.ai
- Email: baidy@tailwindgrowth.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/tailwind-growth/
- Based in Newcastle and Sydney, Australia
